channel.title: INall
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INall, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Meet Noscroll, an AI bot that does your doomscrolling for you
item.description: Noscroll wants to cure doomscrolling with an AI bot that reads the internet for you.

item.title: What Happens to Your Body When You Drink Enough Water
Cravings, Fatigue, & Mood Swings? Here's What To Eat Each Phase Of Your Cycle
item.description: And permission to eat the carbs (and the chocolate!)

item.title: Could a jet fuel shortage really ruin your summer trip to Europe? What flyers should know
item.description: Concerns over a growing shortage of jet fuel on the continent have raised fears about potential flight cancellations if things don’t improve.

item.title: Paranormal writer David Wilcock voiced financial worries before death
item.description: Police say Wilcock was battling serious financial issues prior to his death.

item.title: Alaska Airlines airport lounges: How to get access to this VIP space
item.description: Learn how to access Alaska Airlines lounges in 2026, including by paying for a membership and having the right credit card.

item.title: Cheap options suggest a big post-earnings swing next week for these tech titans
item.description: Wall Street is underestimating a potential price explosion in next week’s tech-stock earnings reports.

item.title: Trump’s meme coin is down 80% since his first event promoting it. He’s holding another gala for it this weekend.
item.description: President Donald Trump plans to host another private event for top holders of his meme coin, but the grand functions aren’t sending the $TRUMP digital...

item.title: Is This The Part Of Endometriosis Treatment We’ve Been Missing?
item.description: Research reveals how endometriosis changes the brain.

item.title: 8 Ways to Get the Protein You Need
Smokey Robinson's $500M countersuit against accusers partially dismissed
item.description: Los Angeles judge trims legal claims in ongoing sexual-assault civil suit.

item.title: Grindr exec says Trump admin officials interested in D.C. party
item.description: White House Correspondents' Dinner weekend bash draws high-level interest.

item.title: I’m New York City’s new health commissioner. Here’s how I’ll help deliver on Zohran Mamdani’s affordability agenda.
item.description: Across the U.S., rising costs for housing, healthcare and basic necessities are taking a toll on people’s well-being.

item.title: Meghan Trainor on Building Confidence and Healthy Habits
item.description: Meghan shares how she’s tuning out criticism, prioritizing her health, and building habits that help her feel stronger than ever.

item.title: 'Storage Wars' to honor Darrell Sheets with in-memoriam during new episode
item.description: A&E will pay tribute to late cast member during weekend broadcast.

item.title: Apple’s Next Chapter, SpaceX and Cursor Strike a Deal, and Palantir’s Controversial Manifesto
item.description: In this week’s episode of Uncanny Valley, we talk about Tim Cook’s legacy as CEO at Apple and what his long-rumored departure means for the future of ...

item.title: 'Deadliest Catch' to pay tribute to late deckhand Todd Meadows in new season
item.description: Show will address death of rookie deckhand but won't show footage of incident.

item.title: Don’t stop hiring humans — stop hiring the wrong humans, Artisan’s founder says
item.description: Artisan may be known for their bold “Stop Hiring Humans” campaign but the reality is every founder needs to assemble the right team if they want to sc...

item.title: 10 'coolest' vacation spots to escape the heat this summer
item.description: Whether you want to hike, ski or eat your way through top restaurants, here are 10 of the best destinations to escape the heat this summer.

item.title: OpenAI releases GPT-5.5, bringing company one step closer to an AI ‘super app’
item.description: OpenAI says its latest model offers increased capabilities across a broad variety of categories.

item.title: As Americans turn to blue-collar jobs for stability, here’s which ones offer the most security — and which offer the least
item.description: College affordability issues and tech layoffs have boosted interest in the skilled trades, but “blue-collar work isn’t necessarily insulated from othe...

item.title: What's old is new again: Hilton's Conrad Athens The Ilisian opens today
item.description: The iconic Hilton Athens has been transformed into Greece's first Conrad.

item.title: Trump’s pick to run US cyber agency CISA asks to drop out
item.description: Sean Plankey has requested to withdraw his name to run the U.S. cybersecurity agency after a tumultuous year of chaotic temporary leadership.

item.title: Investors are worried about private credit’s close ties to software stocks. So, why is money flooding into these ETFs?
item.description: Some investors are shunning private-credit funds, but billions of dollars are still flowing into funds with a big software exposure.

item.title: Lufthansa's first Airbus A380 with upgraded business class debuts on flight to LAX
item.description: Lufthansa's first Airbus A380 with a new business class cabin entered service on Thursday flying between Munich and Los Angeles.
